# Plant Commerce - Full API Guide

## Overview

Plant Commerce aggregates species, cultivars, nursery inventory, and community listings for perennial crops.

Core objects:
- `plant_entity`: species-level record
- `cultivar`: named material under a species
- `inventory_offer`: active nursery listing
- `nursery`: seller profile
- `community_listing`: user-submitted WTS/WTB listing

All API responses use:
- Success: `{ ok: true, data, meta?, links? }`
- Error: `{ ok: false, error: { code, message } }`

## Pagination Contract

List endpoints support:
- `limit` (default `20`, max `100`)
- `offset` (default `0`)

Responses include:
- `meta.total` (full result size before paging)
- `meta.limit`
- `meta.offset`
- `links.self`
- `links.next` when more rows exist
- `links.prev` when offset > 0

## Search

`GET /api/search`

Query params:
- `q` (required)
- `zone` (optional int `1..13`)
- `category` (optional string)
- `inStock` (optional boolean; use `true`)
- `limit`, `offset`

Returns rows from the material search index including:
- `index_source`
- `entity_id`
- `slug`
- `canonical_name`
- `material_type`
- `botanical_name`
- `species_common_name`
- `species_slug`
- `genus`
- `family`
- `active_offer_count`
- `usda_zone_min`
- `usda_zone_max`
- `display_category`

## Plants API (Sparse Fieldsets + Paging)

### Species endpoint

`GET /api/plants/{speciesSlug}`

Query params:
- `fields` (optional CSV sparse fieldset)
- `limit`, `offset` (applies to cultivar list)

Examples:
- `?fields=canonical_name,botanical_name`
- `?fields=canonical_name,cultivars.canonical_name,cultivars.slug`

Fieldset rules:
- Root fields without prefix apply to `data`
- `data.field` is also supported
- `cultivars.field` applies to each cultivar object
- `*`, `data.*`, or `cultivars.*` request full object for that scope

### Cultivar endpoint

`GET /api/plants/{speciesSlug}/{cultivarSlug}`

Query params:
- `fields` (optional CSV sparse fieldset)
- `limit`, `offset` (applies to offers list)

Examples:
- `?fields=canonical_name,material_type`
- `?fields=canonical_name,offers.raw_price_text,offers.product_page_url`

Fieldset scopes:
- Root: `data` (or unprefixed fields)
- Nested: `offers`, `aliases`, `legal_identifiers`

## Nurseries

### List nurseries

`GET /api/nurseries?limit=20&offset=0`

Returns active published nurseries with `offer_count`.

### Nursery detail

`GET /api/nurseries/{nurserySlug}?limit=20&offset=0`

Returns nursery record plus paginated `inventory`.

## Listings

### Create listing

`POST /api/listings`

Creates pending WTS/WTB listings and attempts resolver matching.

### Read listings

`GET /api/listings?cultivarId={uuid}&limit=20&offset=0`
or
`GET /api/listings?plantEntityId={uuid}&limit=20&offset=0`

Requires `cultivarId` or `plantEntityId`.

## Alerts

`POST /api/alerts`

Creates stock alerts.

Body:
- `email` (required)
- `cultivarId` (optional if `plantEntityId` provided)
- `plantEntityId` (optional if `cultivarId` provided)
- `usdaZone` (optional int `1..13`)

Duplicate active alerts for the same target/email return `duplicate: true`.

## Other Discovery Endpoints

- `GET /api` (endpoint registry)
- `GET /api/schema` (static schema metadata)
- `GET /feed.xml` (RSS feed)
- `GET /llms.txt` / `GET /llms-full.txt` (this documentation)
